creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
4 beautiful and IG-worthy beaches to visit in Dubai:

🏝️ Palm West Beach
* Palm Jumeirah
* View of Dubai Marina’s impressive skyline + a strip of excellent restaurants to choose from
* Free entry

☀️ Mamzar Beach
* Al Mamzar
* Barbecue and picnic areas
* Entrance: 5 AED

🏖️ Dubai Islands Beach
* Deira
* Pet-friendly, free use of sunbed
* Free entry

🌊 JBR Beach
* Dubai Marina
* View of Ain Dubai + lots of activities in the area
* Free entry

Save for your Dubai trip!
